pages.name: Amazon Basics
pages.note: Shared Amazon cross-brand page, not counted in Gritin editorial totals

contentSummary.keyObservation: Exceptionally video-heavy store with almost equal video and image count. Product category pages rely heavily on videos to demonstrate lighting and sleep product features.

heroBanner.description: Brand hero with Gritin positioning on lifestyle/lighting/sleep products. Professional product and lifestyle imagery.
heroBanner.brandIdentityNote: Establishes Gritin as lifestyle lighting brand - modern, functional, accessible sleep and task lighting solutions.

modules.designRationale: Large hero banner establishing brand and product category positioning

tiles.description: Primary brand hero introducing Gritin lighting and sleep accessories

modules.designRationale: Visual divider separating hero from category sections
Primary product category highlights (lighting and lifestyle products)

tiles.description: Featured product category (e.g., Reading Lamps or Sleep Accessories)
Secondary hero or lifestyle imagery showcasing product use

modules.designRationale: Category navigation grid with visual dividers between sections

pages.designNote: Homepage concentrates 18 of 27 total editorial images (67%). Uses classic banner + divider + tile layout with sophisticated image hierarchy. No videos on homepage - all video content distributed across product category pages.
Product grid page focused on showcasing all current offers/deals. Minimal editorial content - primarily product tiles with minimal hero.
New product arrivals showcase. Pure product grid with no editorial imagery or video content.

Product category page for under-cabinet lighting. No editorial images but heavy video content (4 videos) to demonstrate lighting functionality and product features. Videos show product in use, brightness levels, and installation.

Most video-dense page in store (10 videos). Product category for clip-on reading lamps. Single editorial image with extensive video coverage showing product angles, brightness demonstrations, flexibility, and various lighting scenarios. Videos are key content asset for this product type.
Product category for foldable mini reading lamps. Minimal editorial image but 5 videos demonstrating portability, brightness, and use cases. Video emphasis supports product demonstrability.
Neck reading lamp category page. Minimal editorial content with 5 videos showing flexibility, comfort, brightness levels, and various wearing positions.
Sleep accessory (eye mask) category page. More editorial imagery (3 images) than other sub-pages, plus 1 video. Images support sleep/wellness benefit messaging.
Sports accessories category. Minimal editorial (2 images) with 1 supporting video. Bridges lifestyle positioning - Gritin products used across fitness and wellness contexts.

colorScheme.rationale: Light, clean aesthetic appropriate for lighting products. Bright, optimistic tone matches lifestyle positioning. Stark contrast with task lighting brand (ESN's black background) - Gritin positions products as lifestyle/sleep/wellness rather than performance.

typography.primary: Modern sans-serif, title case for product categories
typography.characteristics: Clean, accessible, contemporary. German language product names emphasize functional clarity (SUPERHELLE UNTERBAULEUCHTEN, CLIP-ON-BUCHLAMPE, AUGENMASKE).

photography.focus: Lighting demonstrations, sleep/wellness contexts, product usability
photography.subjects: Reading scenes, comfortable sleep environments, portable lighting solutions, product detail shots

layoutPatterns.homepage: Large hero (3000x1500) + narrow dividers (872x109) + category tiles (436x436) with strategic divider placement for visual breathing room
layoutPatterns.categoryPages: Minimal hero + product grid. Heavy reliance on video for product demonstration over static imagery.
layoutPatterns.videoStrategy: Videos are primary content asset on product pages - used to show lighting in action, demonstrate product flexibility, and illustrate use cases

hierarchyStructure.navigationDepth: 1 level - flat navigation structure (all pages at same level, no sub-categories)
hierarchyStructure.pageCount: 9 own pages + 1 shared Amazon Basics page
hierarchyStructure.distribution: Inverted compared to ESN: Homepage concentrates 67% of editorial images (18 of 27), while sub-pages are image-light (0-3 images each). Videos distributed across product pages (0 on homepage, 1-10 on category pages).
hierarchyStructure.strategy: Simple, category-focused store emphasizing quick navigation to specific product types. Video-first approach for demonstrating product features.

distribution.rationale: Homepage image concentration - brand gateway and category navigation. Zero videos on homepage keeps initial page lightweight while establishing visual identity.
Highest video density. Product category requires extensive demonstration of angles, brightness levels, flexibility, and real-world usage. Video format ideal for showing product functionality.
Under-cabinet lighting category relies purely on video demonstration. Brightness and installation videos critical for this product category.
Portability and flexibility best demonstrated through video. 5 videos show foldability and use in various contexts.
Neck lamp flexibility and comfort best shown through video. Multiple angles and wearing positions require dynamic content.
Sleep accessory category has highest editorial image count among sub-pages (3 images). Images support wellness/sleep benefit messaging; minimal video needed.
Secondary lifestyle category. Moderate editorial image support with minimal video.
Deal/offer page - minimal editorial, product-grid focused
Pure product grid - new arrivals page with no editorial content

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Clean, light aesthetic with bright lifestyle imagery. Product-centric photography emphasizes functionality and use cases. Minimal decorative elements. Modern sans-serif typography in German emphasizes product clarity and accessibility. Overall tone is contemporary and wellness-focused, contrasting with performance/athletic aesthetics of competitor brands.
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Wellness-conscious consumers, sleep optimization seekers, students and professionals requiring task lighting, travelers and those valuing portable solutions, fitness enthusiasts using multi-purpose accessories
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Flat, category-focused structure (9 pages, single navigation level). Rather than deep specialization like ESN, Gritin emphasizes quick access to specific product types: lighting (5 categories: SUPERHELLE UNTERBAULEUCHTEN, CLIP-ON-BUCHLAMPE, FALTBARE MINI-BUCHLAMPE, HALS LESELAMPE) + sleep (AUGENMASKE) + lifestyle (SPORT). All pages equally accessible from main navigation. Fast product discovery over ecosystem exploration.
brandIdentity.contentStrategy: Video-first product pages (average 3.7 videos per category page). Homepage image-heavy (18 images) establishes visual brand identity, while product pages delegate demonstration to video. This ratio (1:1 image-to-video) is exceptional - most stores favor static images. Suggests products benefit from dynamic demonstration: lighting brightness, product flexibility, real-world usage contexts.

keyDifferences: Store complexity: ESN's 21 pages vs Gritin's 9 pages - ESN uses deep categorization for specialization, Gritin prioritizes simplicity
Content approach: ESN image-centric (12.5:1 ratio), Gritin video-centric (1:1 ratio) - reflects product demonstrability needs
Brand tone: ESN elite/performance, Gritin lifestyle/wellness - different market positions and buyer psychology
Homepage concentration: ESN spreads content across many pages, Gritin concentrates 67% of images on homepage for visual impact
